# Alpha One Index

> Open-source research hub for AI infrastructure, security, and governance indexes. Automated data pipelines refresh hourly and weekly.

## About

Alpha One Index is an independent, open-source research initiative that aggregates and indexes critical data across the AI ecosystem. All data is sourced from public repositories, official documentation, and peer-reviewed research.

- Website: https://alphaoneindex.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/alpha-one-index

## Indexes

### AI Infrastructure Index
Comprehensive tracking of GPU clouds, inference providers, MLOps platforms, and compute pricing across the AI stack. Updated hourly.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/
- Full reference: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/llms-full.txt

### AI TRiSM Index
Trust, Risk, and Security Management frameworks. 60+ vendor profiles, market sizing, regulatory tracking, and Gartner framework analysis. Updated hourly.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-trism-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/
- Full reference: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-trism-index/blob/main/llms-full.txt

### AI Red Teaming Index
Adversarial testing tools, jailbreak research, prompt injection defenses, and red team methodologies for LLMs. Updated weekly.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-red-teaming-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/
- Full reference: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-red-teaming-index/blob/main/llms-full.txt

### AI LLMOps Index
Observability platforms, inference cost intelligence, failure mode taxonomy, and stack compatibility matrices. Updated weekly.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-llmops-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/
- Full reference: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-llmops-index/blob/main/llms-full.txt

### AI AppSec Index
AI-augmented application security: remediation benchmarks, ASPM matrices, AI-code vulnerability tracking, and CRA compliance. Updated weekly.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/
- Full reference: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index/blob/main/llms-full.txt
